title: SpaceX Starship: A Faster Trip to Uranus
summary: Uranus is a planet far away in our solar system that scientists want to explore more. It has strange features like spinning on its side and icy moons. The only spacecraft to visit was Voyager 2, which flew by 40 years ago. Now, SpaceX is building a new rocket called Starship that could make trips to Uranus much faster. Starship is big and powerful, and it might be able to refuel in space, helping it travel quicker. Scientists at MIT studied how Starship could help a mission to Uranus by acting like a heat shield to slow down and enter orbit. This could cut travel time in half, making it easier and cheaper to explore Uranus in the 2030s.

questions.question: When might a mission to Uranus happen?

background_read: Uranus is a planet in our solar system that is very far from Earth. It is called an ice giant because it is cold and made of gases. Scientists are curious about Uranus because it spins on its side and has moons that might have water under ice. Exploring Uranus can help us learn about other planets in space. SpaceX is a company that builds rockets, and their new Starship rocket could make space travel faster and cheaper, helping us send missions to Uranus sooner.
Article_Structure: WHAT: Using Starship to explore Uranus faster
WHERE: Uranus in our solar system
WHY: To study Uranus' strange features and make missions easier

perspectives.description: Scientists want to explore Uranus to learn about its unique features and icy moons.
